checklist.content:
#  |DEST|ITEM                                                                            |CHK |  DUR  | TIME-IN | TIME-OUT|T
 #  |DEST|ITEM                                                                            |CHK |  DUR  | TIME-IN | TIME-OUT|T
Date: ____________3-18-2026______________________
Time: ________________________________________
Place: _________Glen Rose_____________
Conditions: ____________________________________
_______Purpose / Objectives ____Test Fire Mixed LOX/CH4 in SS Pipe_________
___Assuming He Press and Purge, Spark Ignition (same logic is on for pyro)___
___Prop orifice into pipe is 0.0625"
___Uses ultra low cracking SS check valves on prop and purge
___SS "T" mixes prop with M/F coupler stuffed with SS to provide mixing
___-4 AN Braided SS Teflon hose to chamber

CREW: ___TD__,  PAD1___




ITEMS IN ITALLICS  OR  GRAY  TEXT ARE INFORMATIONAL ONLY AND NOT TO BE CALLED OUT
0   |TD  |Load current CHECKLIST if you haven't done so already                           |X   |0.0    |        |12:15:52|1
1   |TD  |Comm Check,  PAD1                                                               |O   |3621.2 |12:15:52|        |1
2   |PAD1|Verify all containment ready, blocks and shields                                |O   |0.0    |        |        |1

      TEST will have previously started Command and Control App
3   |PAD1|Has tightness check been completed                                              |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
4   |PAD1|Verify LOX and Fuel Vents Open                                                  |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
5   |PAD1|Verify no propellants loaded                                                    |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
6   |PAD1|Verify Helium Bottle Valve Closed                                               |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
7   |PAD1|Verify Helium Regulator Fully OFF                                               |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
======================= PRE-TEST CHECKS ==================================================
10  |TD  |Verify controls of the following:                                               |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
11  |    |       LOX Vent                                                                 |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
12  |    |       LOX Outlet                                                               |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
13  |    |       Fuel Vent                                                                |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
14  |    |       Fuel Outlet                                                              |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
15  |    |       Purge                                                                    |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
16  |    |       Zero Pressure Transducers,    LOX Zero ____________,  Fuel Zero _________|O   |0.0    |        |        |1
17  |PAD1|Verify clear for Spark check, test and verify                                   |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
=========================================================================================
20  |TD  |On control app restart log, note name ______________________________            |O   |0.0    |        |        |1

=========================== LOAD LOX TANK ================================================
30  |PAD1|Disconnect LOX Vent Manifold                                                    |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
31  |PAD1|Disconnect LOX Liquid Feed                                                      |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
32  |PAD1|Cap LOX Liquid Feed                                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
33  |PAD1|Fill Tank From LOX Dewar                                                        |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
34  |PAD1|Close Pressure Builder on LOX Dewar                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
35  |PAD1|Cap LOX Run Tank                                                                |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
36  |PAD1|Return to test site                                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
37  |PAD1|Uncap LOX Liquid Feed, Connect to Test Fixture                                  |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
38  |PAD1|Connect LOX vent manifold                                                       |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
39  |PAD1|Verify LOX Connections                                                          |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
40  |PAD1|Temporarily close LOX Vent                                                      |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
41  |TD  |Verify pressure increases, test LOX Vent Solenoid Valve, verify press drops     |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
42  |PAD1|Open LOX Manual Vent                                                            |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
=========================================================================================
=========================== LOAD FUEL TANK ===============================================
50  |PAD1|Disconnect Fuel Vent Manifold                                                   |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
51  |PAD1|Disconnect Fuel Liquid Feed                                                     |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
52  |PAD1|Cap Fuel Liquid Feed                                                            |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
53  |PAD1|Fill Tank From Fuel Dewar                                                       |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
54  |PAD1|Close Pressure Builder on Fuel Dewar                                            |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
55  |PAD1|Cap Fuel Run Tank                                                               |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
56  |PAD1|Return to test site                                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
57  |PAD1|Uncap Fuel Liquid Feed, Connect to Test Fixture                                 |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
58  |PAD1|Connect Fuel Vent Manifold                                                      |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
59  |PAD1|Verify Fuel Connections                                                         |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
60  |PAD1|Temporarily close Fuel Vent                                                     |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
61  |TD  |Verify pressure increases, test Fuel Vent Solenoid Valve, verify press drops    |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
62  |PAD1|Open Fuel Manual Vent                                                           |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
==========================================================================================
============================= START HAZARDOUS OPS =======================================
70  |TD  |Turn on  'Vent ALL'  button,    verify  ON / GREEN                              |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
71  |PAD1|Load Liquid Nitrogen                                                            |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
72  |PAD1|Verify camera positions                                                         |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
73  |PAD1|Verify Helium Regulator is still OFF                                            |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
74  |PAD1|Close LOX and Fuel Manual Vents                                                 |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
75  |PAD1|Open Helium Bottle Valve, report pressure ________________________              |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
76  |PAD1|Set Helium regulator to : _____50_____psi                                       |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
============================= START PRESSURIZATION =======================================
81  |PAD1|Start Recording CAM1 (normal speed)                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
82  |PAD1|Retreat for test, report when ready                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
83  |TD  |Turn OFF 'Vent ALL'                                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
84  |TD  |Begin pressurization                                                            |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
85  |TD  |Announce when pressurization is complete                                        |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
============================= PRESS COMPLETE ============================================
92  |PAD1|Go, NOGO for test?                                                              |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
        If NOGO, check with PAD1 on scrub or hold
        IF SCRUB, Go to Appendix A - SCRUB
95  |TD  |'ARMING THE SYSTEM'                                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
96  |TD  |Arm ignition    and   SPARK                                                     |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
97  |PAD1|Start Camera 2  (Slow Motion)                                                   |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
============================== FIRING SEQUENCE ==========================================
100 |TD  |Start SPARK                                                                     |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
101 |TD  |Press    RUN TEST   Button                                                      |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
Test is automated, ensures mixed out is on for 15 seconds and fires spark
NOTE: the automated test DOES NOT ARM ignition or spark!

===================== APPENDIX - A       SCRUB / TEST COMPLETE ===============================
200 |TD  |Press  'Vent ALL',     verify ON / GREEN                                        |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
201 |TD  |Turn OFF LOX and Fuel Pressurization                                            |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
202 |TD  |Turn OFF   'Ignition ARM'                                                       |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
203 |TD  |Turn OFF   'MIXED Out'                                                          |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
204 |TD  |Announce when safe to approach (<5psi)                                          |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
205 |PAD1|Open Manual Vents                                                               |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
206 |TD  |Turn OFF   'Vent ALL'                                                           |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
=========================================================================================
=========================== POST TEST TASKS ==============================================
300 |PAD1|Open LN2 Dewar Vent                                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
301 |PAD1|Close LN2 Dewar Pressure-builder                                                |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
302 |PAD1|Open LOX Dewar Vent                                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
303 |PAD1|Close LOX Dewar Pressure-builder                                                |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
304 |PAD1|Open LNG Dewar Vent                                                             |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
305 |PAD1|Close LNG Dewar Pressure-builder                                                |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
306 |PAD1|Turn of Helium Regulator                                                        |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
307 |PAD1|Report final Helium pressure __________________                                 |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
308 |PAD1|Close  Helium  bottle valve                                                     |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
309 |ALL |TURN OFF RADIOS                                                                 |O   |0.0    |        |        |1
